category_sources: source_facts.description says it plays Go; GNU Go documentation introduces GNU Go and the Go Text Protocol.
display_name_sources: GNU Go homepage and documentation use GNU Go; source_facts.name is gnu-go.
docs_sources: Official GNU Go documentation table of contents is hosted under gnu.org/software/gnugo.
repo_sources: GNU Go development page says the latest source code is in the Savannah Git repository and gives git://git.savannah.gnu.org/gnugo.git; official cgit webview is the corresponding repository browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable identify Go-playing CLI; GNU Go docs describe the Go Text Protocol for interfaces.
